title: Verify a crop prediction is returned from soil inputs
description: This verifies a user can submit valid soil inputs and receive a complete crop recommendation with yield, price, confidence, and prediction history data.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in valid soil nitrogen, phosphorus, potassium, pH, humidity, temperature, and rainfall inputs
Submit the prediction
Verify a crop recommendation is displayed
Verify yield estimate, price estimate, confidence, and prediction identifier are displayed

title: Get a crop prediction from soil inputs
description: Verify a user can submit soil inputs and receive a prediction response with the recommended crop, yield estimate, price estimate, confidence, and prediction identifier.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/predict
Fill in valid soil input values
Submit the prediction request
Verify a crop recommendation is displayed
Verify yield, price, confidence, and prediction details are displayed

title: Get a crop recommendation from soil inputs
description: This verifies that a user can submit valid soil inputs and receive a complete crop prediction response.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the crop prediction workflow
Fill in valid soil nitrogen content
Fill in valid soil phosphorus content
Fill in valid soil potassium content
Fill in a valid soil temperature
Fill in a valid soil humidity
Fill in a valid soil pH value
Fill in a valid rainfall amount
Submit the prediction request
Verify a crop recommendation is displayed
Verify yield, price, confidence, top predictions, and a prediction identifier are displayed

title: Get a weather-enriched crop prediction
description: Verify a user can enable weather enrichment, provide a city, and receive a prediction that incorporates autofilled weather data into the result.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/predict
Enable weather-based prediction
Fill in a valid city for weather autofill
Fill in valid soil input values
Submit the prediction request
Verify a crop recommendation is displayed
Verify weather-enriched prediction details are displayed

title: Verify service health and readiness
description: This verifies the service reports healthy status with loaded models, crop metadata, and weather configuration so the app is ready for use.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/health
Verify the service status is healthy
Verify model information, crop count, and weather API state are displayed

title: Check service health
description: Verify the health endpoint reports the service is ready so operators can confirm models and weather configuration are loaded.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/health
Verify service health status is displayed
Verify model and weather readiness details are displayed

title: Verify weather autofill is merged into a prediction
description: This verifies a user can request weather autofill for a city and complete a weather-enriched prediction using the returned values.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Enable weather-based prediction input
Fill in a city for weather autofill
Request weather autofill
Submit the prediction with the merged weather inputs
Verify weather data is included in the prediction result
Verify a crop recommendation is displayed

title: Confirm the app is ready for crop planning
description: This verifies that the service health, supported crops, and frontend shell all load successfully so the app is ready to use.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/health
Verify the service health information is displayed
Click the link to view supported crops
Verify supported crop information is displayed
Click the link to open the frontend home page
Verify the app shell and API information are displayed

title: Check weather data for a city
description: Verify a user can request weather data for a city and see the returned weather information used for planning.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/weather
Fill in a valid city
Submit the weather request
Verify weather information is displayed

title: Verify validation errors are shown for invalid prediction inputs
description: This verifies invalid or missing prediction fields are rejected with visible validation feedback instead of producing a prediction.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in an out-of-range or incomplete set of prediction inputs
Submit the prediction
Verify a validation error is displayed
Verify no prediction result is displayed

title: View weather details for a city
description: This verifies that a user can request live weather data for a city and see the full weather summary needed for planning.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the weather data view
Fill in a valid city name
Request weather data
Verify a weather summary is displayed
Verify temperature, humidity, rainfall, advisory, sunrise, and sunset data are displayed

title: Verify weather data is displayed for a city
description: This verifies a user can fetch live weather information for a city to support planning decisions.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Enter a city for weather lookup
Request the weather report
Verify weather information is displayed
Verify the selected city is reflected in the weather result

title: Pre-fill prediction inputs from weather autofill
description: This verifies that weather autofill returns form-ready values a user can use to start a prediction quickly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the weather autofill view
Fill in a valid city name
Request autofill values
Verify city and country details are displayed
Verify autofill temperature, humidity, rainfall, and display metadata are shown

title: View recent prediction history
description: This verifies that recent predictions can be retrieved and reviewed through the history view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the prediction history view
Request the most recent prediction history
Verify recent prediction entries are displayed
Verify the total number of stored predictions is displayed

title: Verify prediction history shows recent results
description: This verifies a user can view recently created predictions in the history view after submitting a prediction.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Submit a valid prediction
Open the prediction history view
Verify the recent prediction is displayed in history
Verify the history view includes prediction details

title: View supported crops metadata
description: Verify the supported crop metadata page or data loads so users can review available crop options before predicting.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/crops
Verify supported crop metadata is displayed

title: Verify supported crops are listed
description: This verifies the crop catalog loads successfully with supported crop metadata and a total count for planning decisions.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/crops
Verify the crop list is displayed
Verify the total crop count is displayed

title: Verify the frontend app shell loads
description: This verifies the main frontend page loads and exposes the application and API information needed to start using the service.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the app shell is displayed
Verify API information is visible

title: Load the frontend app shell
description: Verify the root route serves the frontend app shell or API information so the application can be opened in the browser.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the frontend app shell or API information is displayed

title: Check mandi market prices for a city
description: Verify a user can request live mandi market prices and see commodity records for planning crop sales.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/mandi
Verify market price records are displayed

title: Review and submit feedback for a prediction
description: This verifies that a user can open a recent prediction and submit correction feedback tied to that prediction.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the prediction history view
Open a recent prediction entry
Open the feedback form for that prediction
Fill in that the prediction was correct
Fill in the actual crop if needed
Submit the feedback
Verify feedback submission confirmation is visible
Verify the feedback is associated with the selected prediction

title: Submit feedback for a prior prediction
description: Verify a user can submit correction feedback for a prediction after obtaining its identifier and receive confirmation that the feedback was recorded.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/predict
Fill in valid soil input values
Submit the prediction request
Open the feedback submission view
Fill in the prediction identifier
Fill in the correction details
Submit the feedback
Verify a feedback confirmation is visible

title: Verify feedback can be submitted for a prediction
description: This verifies a user can send correction feedback tied to a prediction and receive a visible submission confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Submit a valid prediction
Open the feedback flow for that prediction
Enter a correction or rating
Submit the feedback
Verify a feedback confirmation is displayed
Verify the submitted prediction remains available for reference

title: Fetch live mandi prices for a market
description: This verifies that a user can look up live mandi prices for planning crop sales.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the mandi market prices view
Fill in a valid market or city name
Request market prices
Verify mandi price results are displayed
Verify commodity and price details are displayed

title: Verify mandi market prices are displayed for a market search
description: This verifies a user can look up commodity prices for a market and review live market planning data.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Enter a market or city for mandi lookup
Request mandi prices
Verify mandi price information is displayed
Verify the market result includes commodity data

title: Handle missing city for weather lookup
description: This verifies that the weather form rejects a lookup when the city is omitted and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the weather data view
Request weather data without entering a city
Verify a city-required validation error is visible

title: Verify weather lookup requires a city
description: This verifies the weather lookup prevents submission when the city is missing and shows validation feedback instead of results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the weather lookup flow
Request weather data without entering a city
Verify a validation error is displayed
Verify no weather result is displayed

title: Limit history retrieval to the server maximum
description: This verifies that requesting an oversized prediction history limit still returns a constrained history result.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the prediction history view
Request prediction history with an oversized limit
Verify the returned history is constrained to the server maximum
Verify the total history count is displayed

title: Reject feedback without a prediction identifier
description: This verifies that feedback submission fails validation when the required prediction identifier is missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the feedback form
Fill in feedback details without a prediction identifier
Submit the feedback
Verify a prediction identifier required validation error is visible

title: Verify prediction submission requires JSON input
description: This verifies the prediction flow rejects invalid submission format and surfaces a clear content-type validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the prediction submission flow
Submit the prediction without valid JSON input
Verify a request format error is displayed
Verify no prediction result is displayed

title: Show unavailable weather guidance for an unknown city
description: This verifies that the weather autofill flow surfaces an unavailable-state message when a city cannot be resolved through live weather lookup.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the weather autofill view
Fill in an unknown city name
Request autofill values
Verify an unavailable weather data message is visible
